raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised text clearly walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "While the agent identifies one prior work (COMET, BLEURT) and articulates the delta, it does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta would have earned a higher score.",
    "R1.7": "The revised text flags one missing or wrong citation (the actual measurement of fr-de calibration is pending), but audits every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the 'first work' claim without a literature check.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and mostly within scope with one drift (the length-ratio finding).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the 'first work' claim), and identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some minor edits are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised text clearly walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: While the agent identifies one prior work (COMET, BLEURT) and articulates the delta, it does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta would have earned a higher score.
rationale.R1.7: The revised text flags one missing or wrong citation (the actual measurement of fr-de calibration is pending), but audits every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the 'first work' claim without a literature check.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and mostly within scope with one drift (the length-ratio finding).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the 'first work' claim), and identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some minor edits are not traced.
